title: June 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 24''' is the 175th day of the year (176th in leap years), with 190 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Charles Howerton]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Julian Holloway]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Mark Klastorin]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[John Gilroy]] is born.
*1959 – [[Dan Gilroy]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Tiffany L. Kurtz]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Terri Douglas]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' (1977) 39]] published.
*[[1987]] – ''[[Star Wars]]'' parody ''Spaceballs'' is released.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal Collector's Edition]]'' published in UK.
*[[2003]] – [[Warren Kremer]] dies.
*[[2005]] – ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature launched on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2008]] - ''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – [[Legacy (2006) 37|''Legacy'' (2006) 37]] published.
*2009 – ''[[Agents of Deception]]'', the fourth card set of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]], released.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Battle of the Sith Lords]]'' cancelled.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 4|''Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge'' - Episode 4]] premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*2020 – [[Bounty Hunters 3|''Bounty Hunters'' 3]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales 2|''Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales'' 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Star Wars Insider 232|''Star Wars Insider'' 232]] published.
<noinclude>
